note: Record #1..N of the CC-preference store. These are real feedback data from the session that cast cc-learning-store — the store's first act is to record the conversation that created it.

records.decision: Before creating public GitHub repos, CC stopped and asked Akien to choose visibility rather than defaulting.
records.signal: Akien answered 'both public' — engaged the question, did not wave it off.
records.confidence_move: raise: 'ask, don't assume, on irreversible/outward acts' is right here. CEILING: repo-visibility is an outward/irreversible gate — it never auto-opens; the call stays Akien's.
records.note: Asking before publishing to the world was the correct move, confirmed by Akien engaging it as a real choice.

records.decision: CC set up GitHub hosting; the option to add CI/Actions was live.
records.signal: Akien: 'I don't want to run any workflows on github.' CC disabled Actions at the repo level (physics).
records.confidence_move: close hard: never auto-add CI/Actions to Cairn's GitHub. High confidence, now backed by physics (Actions disabled). Banked as memory github-hosting-only.
records.note: GitHub is hosting/durability only; running stays on Akien's machines.
records.provenance: Akien message; gh api actions/permissions enabled=false on both repos.

records.decision: CC drafted the founding intention as 'get Akien out of operating' (a removal framing) and treated it as wrapped.
records.signal: Akien reframed it under /challenge: the founding intention is gate-LEARNING; 'Akien out' is only its lead falsifier.
records.confidence_move: lower: CC should NOT finalize founding / Layer-1 intentions alone — these are steering, not operating. Bring the spine to Akien before sealing. CEILING: founding-intention scope is a steering gate; stays Akien's.
records.note: CC wrote the shadow of the intention, not the intention. The challenge found the parent.
records.provenance: Akien's reframe message; rewrite to I-learns-its-gates.

records.decision: CC framed the learning capability as asymptotic / future ('done, asymptotic'; interim someday).
records.signal: Akien: 'we build it now. we start this piece learning today.'
records.confidence_move: shift CC default: bias toward BUILDING the mechanism now over framing it as future work. Lower confidence in CC's lean-to-deferred instinct. A recurring CC-preference to watch.
records.note: This record exists because of this datum — building the store today instead of deferring it is the amendment in action.
records.provenance: Akien ratification message with the build-now amendment.

records.decision: CC proposed 'Cairn preferences' for the learned-friction store.
records.signal: Akien: 'CC preferences might be even better' — mind-type-scoped, homed in that mind's shim.
records.confidence_move: weak-to-moderate: prefer mind-type-scoped naming/scoping over global-Cairn naming when the thing is per-mind. Minor, but a real steer toward locality.
records.note: Different mind-types accumulate different wisdom; a global store would blur them.
records.provenance: Akien message on CC preferences + shims.
